questionHtml: State the relationship between sloth body temperature and ambient temperature.
markschemeHtml:
body temperature increases with ambient temperature / positive correlation;

Since direct can be either –/+, no credit for direct correlation alone.

meta.title: State the relationship between sloth body temperature and ambient temperature.
